sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 12.77 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.12)

statement.latex: (Well-known problem). Does the order (if it is greater than$p^2$) of a finite non-cyclic$p 0.2ex$-group divide the order of its automorphism group? { A.\,I.\,Starostin} No, not always (J.\,Gonz\'alez-S\'anchez, A.\,Jaikin-Zapirain, Forum Math. Sigma, { 3}, Article ID e7, 11 p., electronic only (2015)).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
